arts.sum: Arsenal and other Premier League clubs will be closely monitoring the situation at Real Madrid as Arda Guler’s future grows more uncertain by the day owing to his lack of gametime. The Turkish prodigy, who arrived in Madrid with high expectations in the summer of 2023, is quickly becoming an afterthought at the Spanish giants. arts.ttl: Michel: “Kroos was irreplaceable, but they found Ceballos”
arts.sum: Managing Madrid has been vocal about this in podcasts: Ceballos is Real Madrid’s best ball-progresser this season, as writer Mehedi Hassan also pointed out: “Kroos was irreplaceable, but they found Ceballos, they have Mbappé… Last year I came to win, to make a statement, and they put me in my place.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti on Modric after stunner: 'Gift for football'
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti described Luka Modric as "a gift to football" after the midfielder, 39, scored a spectacular goal in Real Madrid's 2-0 win over Girona on Sunday.
